University 01

March 22, 2021 2025-01-08 12:57

University 01

Welcome to

ORIC

Office of Research, Innovation and Commercialization

Welcome to

ORIC

Office of Research, Innovation and Commercialization

Welcome to ORIC

The Office of Research, Innovation and Commercialization (ORIC) is established under the Higher Education Commission (HEC) strategic initiatives to promote high quality research activities to develop a competitive and knowledge based economy.
Read more

Vision & Mission

ORIC aims to become a top research institution in Pakistan by driving high-quality, multi-disciplinary research, fostering innovation, and enhancing academia-industry connections. Its goals include integrating research at Kinnaird College, boosting industrial competitiveness, and supporting the local economy through technology transfer and commercialization.
Read more

Our Policies

Patent Filing Support

A patent is an exclusive right granted for an invention, which is a product or a process that provides, in general, a new way of doing something, or offers a new technical solution to a problem.
Learn more

Paper Presentation

Kinnaird believes in this very well know fact in RESEARCH that presenting what we have learnt from research can be just as important as performing the research. As Research results can be presented in a variety of ways.
Learn more
50 +

MOU's

30 +

Faculties

5 +
